name: SA Legal — Trust Client Onboarding
description: South African FICA checklist for trust clients per FIC Act s21A — trustee verification, trust deed, Master's Office Letters of Authority, and trust banking.

items.name: Trust Deed
items.description: Certified copy of the trust deed, including all amendments.

items.name: Letters of Authority
items.description: Master's Office Letters of Authority confirming trustee appointments.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Letters of Authority (Master of the High Court)

items.name: Trustee 1 ID
items.description: Certified ID copy of the first trustee.

items.name: Trustee 2 ID
items.description: Certified ID copy of the second trustee (if applicable).

items.name: Proof of Trust Banking
items.description: Trust bank account confirmation letter or statement.

items.name: Beneficial Ownership Declaration
items.description: Declaration of trust beneficial owners per FIC Act s21A(2)(b).

items.name: Source of Funds Declaration
items.description: Declaration of the source of trust funds.

items.name: Engagement Letter Signed
items.description: Signed engagement letter returned by the trustees.

items.name: Conflict Check Performed
items.description: Conflict of interest check run against the trust name and all trustees.

items.name: FICA Risk Assessment
items.description: Risk rating completed per FIC Act Risk Management and Compliance Programme.

items.name: Sanctions Screening
items.description: Trust and all trustees screened against UN and SA sanctions lists.
